grant_title: Community Development Block Grant (CDBG) Program - State of Rhode Island
geographic_restrictions: Rhode Island (33 municipalities not receiving direct HUD allocation; 6 entitlement cities operate independently)
project_area: Housing, economic development, facilities/improvements, services, planning, neighborhood revitalization
demographic_requirements: Primarily for low/moderate income persons (those earning at or below 80% of Area Median Income)
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants must be Rhode Island municipalities or subrecipients (non-profits/other entities) approved by municipalities. Activities must meet national objectives, primarily benefiting low- and moderate-income persons. Competitive application process with annual funding of approximately $4-$5 million.
